event.description: Los Angeles Lakers @ New Orleans Pelicans

article.description: — Anthony Davis had 31 points and 14 rebounds and the Los Angeles Lakers extended their winning streak to five games with a 104-99 victory over the New Orleans Pelicans on Saturday night.
article.headline: Anthony Davis has 31 points and 14 rebounds to lead Lakers past the Pelicans 104-99

images.caption: LeBron James comes up big time for the Lakers with a dagger pull-up 3 vs. the Pelicans in the final minute.
images.name: LeBron hits huge dagger 3-pointer for Lakers vs. Pels

keywords: Los Angeles Lakers @ New Orleans Pelicans
article.linkText: Anthony Davis has 31 points and 14 rebounds to lead Lakers past the Pelicans 104-99
article.story: NEW ORLEANS -- — Anthony Davis had 31 points and 14 rebounds and the Los Angeles Lakers extended their winning streak to five games with a 104-99 victory over the New Orleans Pelicans on Saturday night. LeBron James highlighted a 21-point performance with a pair of pivotal 3-pointers in the final minutes, but his career-long four-game triple-double streak came to an end. Rookie Dalton Knecht hit five 3s to finish with a career-high 27 points in a spot start for the Lakers. One night after posting 40 points and 12 rebounds in a victory at San Antonio, Davis reached the 30-point plateau for the eighth time in 12 games played this season. Brandon Ingram scored 32 points, and reserve Jaylen Nowell scored 16 points for the Pelicans, who've lost 10 of their last 12 games. Takeaways Lakers: Cam Reddish (lower right leg) did not play after leaving Friday night's game in San Antonio earlier than usual. ... Austin Reaves scored 10 points but missed seven of nine 3-point shots. Pelicans: Although forward Trey Murphy III was given the night off as he works his way back from a preseason hamstring injury, injury-depleted New Orleans kept the game competitive with grit and energy. Despite having just 10 players in uniform, the Pelicans led 56-46 at halftime but couldn't quite get the win. Key moment Right after a clutch 3 by Ingram gave the Pelicans a late two-point lead, James responded with consecutive 3s to put the Lakers up 101-97 with 37 seconds left. Key stat The Lakers outscored the Pelicans in the paint, 52-40. Up next The Lakers return to NBA Cup action at home against Utah on Tuesday night, the same night the Pelicans also resume NBA Cup group play at Dallas. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama (center left) and the San Antonio Spurs are favored entering the NBA Finals.

images.alt: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander

images.alt: Jalen Brunson
images.caption: Jalen Brunson has the New York Knicks in the NBA Finals for the first time since 1999.

images.caption: The Knicks are looking to end the series against the Cavaliers tonight, as they have the second-shortest title odds and are an overwhelming favorite to win the East.

images.alt: Jalen Brunson
images.caption: The Knicks are now heavy favorites to win the Eastern Conference after taking a 3-0 series lead over the Cavs.
images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jalen Brunson [608x342]

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander  [1296x729]
